name: 11_system_a_fails_hwm_below_cross
description: Branch 3 / System A: safe_hwm strictly below vwap_cross_hwm_pct fails the arm condition; vwap_ticks reset to 0. System B independent (here also fails -> bleed reset).
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 1.5 >= cross 2.0 is FALSE -> System A condition not met -> else-branch resets vwap_ticks to 0. is_vwap_broken False. System B: current_return 0.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 is FALSE -> bleed_ticks reset to 0. Returns (0, 0, False, False).
